package.name: nav_frontier_go2w_frontier
package.description: Frontier detection and goal selection for the Unitree Go2W. Subscribes to a 2D OccupancyGrid (typically from slam_toolbox), detects frontier cells (free cells adjacent to unknown), clusters them via BFS, scores reachable clusters with score = info_gain - lambda * travel_cost, and publishes the best cluster's goal as a PoseStamped on /frontier_goal.
